name: Full Day North Tour
desc: A full day exploring the lush north. Walk through Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, dive into Port Louis at the Caudan Waterfront, and end at the picturesque fishing village of Cap Malheureux with its iconic red-roofed church.
itin: Free lunch time in Port Louis
notes: Seat in air-conditioned coach. Lunch & drinks NOT included. Route varies by hotel location.
